chip.label: Coolant sensor chip
chip.description: lm-sensors chip key as it appears in `sensors -j` (e.g. quadro-hid-3).

sensor_label.label: Coolant sensor label
sensor_label.description: Sensor label under the chip (e.g. 'Coolant temp').

value_key.label: Coolant value key
value_key.description: JSON key under the label holding the reading (e.g. temp1_input).

chip.label: Watt sensor chip
chip.description: lm-sensors chip key in `sensors -j` exposing CPU package power.

value_key.label: Watt value key
value_key.description: JSON key holding the power reading (e.g. power1_input).

glyph.label: Glyph
glyph.description: Tabler icon name shown before the value (e.g. bolt, cpu).

rapl_path.label: RAPL package dir
rapl_path.description: powercap dir for the CPU package (name == package-0).

glyph.label: Glyph
glyph.description: Tabler icon name shown before the value.

glyph.label: Glyph
glyph.description: Tabler icon name shown before the value.

poll.label: Sample interval (ms)
poll.description: How often /proc/stat is read for new values (animation eases between).

frame.label: Animation frame interval (ms)
frame.description: Redraw cadence for smoothing between samples. 33≈30fps, 16≈60fps. Lower = smoother, more CPU.

smoothing.label: Smoothing (0..1 ease per frame)
smoothing.description: Fraction each bar moves toward its target per frame. Lower = slower glide.
